name: Fall armyworm
description: A moth larva that damages maize and other crops.

name: Powdery mildew
description: Fungal disease with white powdery spots on leaves.

name: Maize
description: Cereal crop widely cultivated for grain.

name: Rice
description: Staple cereal crop cultivated worldwide.

name: Seedling
description: Early growth stage after germination.

name: Tillering
description: Stage when rice produces tillers.

name: Flowering
description: Flowering stage of crop.

name: Milk stage
description: Grain milk stage after flowering.

name: Dough stage
description: Grain dough stage after milk stage.

name: Spinosad
description: Biological insecticide used for caterpillars.

name: Generic insecticide
description: Non-specific insecticide placeholder for weak extraction.

name: High humidity
description: Sustained high relative humidity.

name: Leaf holes
description: Irregular holes or chewing damage on leaves.

name: Hopperburn
description: Wilting and browning of plants caused by planthopper feeding.

name: Wilting
description: Plant wilting due to damage or stress.

name: Yellowing
description: Yellowing of leaves or plants (chlorosis).

name: Deadheart
description: Dead central shoot in tillering stage caused by stem borers.

name: Whitehead
description: White, empty panicles in reproductive stage caused by stem borers.

name: Test field
description: Example placeholder location.

name: 稻纵卷叶螟
description: 水稻主要害虫之一，幼虫卷叶取食。

name: 二化螟
description: 水稻钻蛀性害虫，危害稻秆。

name: 大螟
description: 禾本科作物钻蛀性害虫。

name: 白背飞虱
description: 刺吸式口器害虫，危害水稻。

name: 稻螟蛉
description: 水稻害虫，具体种名待补充。

name: 玉米螟
description: 玉米重要钻蛀性害虫。

name: 杨雪毒蛾
description: 林木害虫，取食叶片。

name: 螻蛄
description: 地下害虫，咬食根茎。

name: 金龟子
description: 取食叶片或根部的害虫。

name: 褐飞虱
description: 水稻重要害虫，刺吸危害。

name: 稻飞虱
description: 稻飞虱类害虫统称（含褐飞虱、白背飞虱等）。
